---
title: "03 Daily Summaries"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
r_libs_user <- Sys.getenv("R_LIBS_USER")
if (r_libs_user == "") stop("R_LIBS_USER is not set.")
.libPaths(c(r_libs_user, .libPaths()))

library(dplyr)
library(fs)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

day_folder <- Sys.getenv("DAILYDIR")
if (day_folder == "") stop("DAILYDIR is not set.")

daily_all_file <- file.path(day_folder, "garmin_daily_all_simple.rds")
if (!file.exists(daily_all_file)) stop("Missing file: ", daily_all_file)

daily_all <- readRDS(daily_all_file)

if (nrow(daily_all) == 0) stop("daily_all is empty.")

if (!"date" %in% names(daily_all)) stop("date column is missing from daily_all.")
daily_all$date <- as.Date(daily_all$date)

# Adherence file
adherence_file <- file.path(day_folder, "garmin_daily_adherence.rds")
has_adherence <- file.exists(adherence_file)

if (has_adherence) {
  daily_adherence <- readRDS(adherence_file)
  daily_adherence$date <- as.Date(daily_adherence$date)
}
```

```{r dataset overview}
## Dataset Overview
overview <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "Rows (participant-days)",
    "Participants",
    "First date",
    "Last date"
  ),
  value = c(
    nrow(daily_all),
    dplyr::n_distinct(daily_all$participant_id),
    as.character(min(daily_all$date, na.rm = TRUE)),
    as.character(max(daily_all$date, na.rm = TRUE))
  )
)

knitr::kable(overview)
```

```{r participant coverage}
## Participant coverage
participant_days <- daily_all %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n_distinct(date),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(participant_days, aes(x = n_days)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of observed days per participant",
    x = "Observed days",
    y = "Number of participants"
  )
```


```{r steps}
## Steps
if ("steps_sum_24hr" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  ggplot(daily_all %>% filter(!is.na(steps_sum_24hr)),
         aes(x = steps_sum_24hr)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of daily steps",
      x = "Steps per day",
      y = "Participant-days"
    )
}

if ("steps_sum_24hr" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  steps_participant <- daily_all %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(
      median_steps = median(steps_sum_24hr, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(median_steps))

  ggplot(steps_participant, aes(x = median_steps)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of median daily steps by participant",
      x = "Participant median daily steps",
      y = "Number of participants"
    )
}
```

```{r hr}
## Heart rate
if ("hr_mean_24hr" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  ggplot(daily_all %>% filter(!is.na(hr_mean_24hr)),
         aes(x = hr_mean_24hr)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of mean daily heart rate",
      x = "Mean heart rate per day",
      y = "Participant-days"
    )
}
if ("hr_mean_24hr" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  hr_participant <- daily_all %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(
      median_hr = median(hr_mean_24hr, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(median_hr))

  ggplot(hr_participant, aes(x = median_hr)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of median daily heart rate by participant",
      x = "Participant median daily heart rate",
      y = "Number of participants"
    )
}
```

```{r stress}
## Stress
if ("stress_mean_24hr" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  ggplot(daily_all %>% filter(!is.na(stress_mean_24hr)),
         aes(x = stress_mean_24hr)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of mean daily stress",
      x = "Mean stress per day",
      y = "Participant-days"
    )
}

if ("stress_mean_24hr" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  stress_participant <- daily_all %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(
      median_stress = median(stress_mean_24hr, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(median_stress))

  ggplot(stress_participant, aes(x = median_stress)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of median daily stress by participant",
      x = "Participant median daily stress",
      y = "Number of participants"
    )
}
```

```{r bbi}
## BBI
if ("n_nonmissing_bbi" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  ggplot(daily_all %>% filter(!is.na(n_nonmissing_bbi)),
         aes(x = n_nonmissing_bbi)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of non-missing BBI rows per day",
      x = "Non-missing BBI rows per day",
      y = "Participant-days"
    )
}

if ("n_nonmissing_bbi" %in% names(daily_all)) {
  bbi_participant <- daily_all %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(
      median_bbi_rows = median(n_nonmissing_bbi, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(median_bbi_rows))

  ggplot(bbi_participant, aes(x = median_bbi_rows)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of median daily non-missing BBI rows by participant",
      x = "Participant median non-missing BBI rows",
      y = "Number of participants"
    )
}
```

```{r adherence}
## Adherence (requires script 04)
if (has_adherence) {
  ggplot(daily_adherence %>% filter(!is.na(adherence_weartimepc_24hr)),
         aes(x = adherence_weartimepc_24hr)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of daily adherence percentage",
      x = "Adherence (% of 24 hours)",
      y = "Participant-days"
    )
}

if (has_adherence) {
  valid_days <- daily_adherence %>%
    mutate(valid_day = adherence_weartimepc_24hr >= 70) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(
      n_valid_days = sum(valid_day, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  ggplot(valid_days, aes(x = n_valid_days)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
    labs(
      title = "Number of valid adherence days per participant",
      x = "Valid days (>= 70% wear time)",
      y = "Number of participants"
    )
}
```

```{r missing check}
## Missingness
vars_to_check <- c(
  "steps_sum_24hr",
  "hr_mean_24hr",
  "stress_mean_24hr",
  "n_nonmissing_bbi"
)

vars_to_check <- vars_to_check[vars_to_check %in% names(daily_all)]

missing_summary <- tibble(
  variable = vars_to_check,
  n_nonmissing = sapply(vars_to_check, function(v) sum(!is.na(daily_all[[v]]))),
  n_missing = sapply(vars_to_check, function(v) sum(is.na(daily_all[[v]]))),
  pct_missing = sapply(vars_to_check, function(v) mean(is.na(daily_all[[v]])) * 100)
)

knitr::kable(missing_summary, digits = 1)
```
